photos.subtitle: Relive the best moments from our beach gatherings and special events

photos.instagramTagDescription: If you share these photos on Instagram, please tag us @Carioca_Coastal_Club

photos.galleryInfoDescription: This gallery showcases our best shots from the event. Every photo displayed here is also available in our complete archive, where you can find all photos taken during this time.

galleryTitles.2025-08-24: Social Media Day with Favela Children

galleryDescriptions.2025-09-20: Truth or Consequence Beer Pong - A fun game night at the beach with friends and great service
galleryDescriptions.2025-09-05: Beer Pong at the beach at barraca 82. It was a lot of fun and the service was exceptional
galleryDescriptions.2025-08-24: Second day of our advertising campaign. The children joined us in games for most of the day because the weather wasn't very good. They did a really good job, and we all had fun, which is what matters most.
galleryDescriptions.2025-08-23: Advertising campaign for August 23, 2025. Besides doing advertising on IG, we decided to see if the children selling things on the beach could help us. We gave them a QR code and asked people to go to our website, then follow us. It was a huge success!
galleryDescriptions.2025-07-27: The official launch party. We had a really great turnout. We are grateful to have met so many unique and kind people.

about.title: About Carioca Coastal Club
about.subtitle: We're the loyalty platform connecting Rio's barraca lovers with their favorite spots. Check if your barraca is open, reserve chairs, and enjoy exclusive member benefits.
about.missionDescription: To strengthen the bond between Rio's barraca community and their favorite spots. We believe loyal customers deserve better service, and barraca owners deserve loyal customers who keep coming back.
about.missionQuote: Every barraca has its regulars - we help strengthen those relationships.
about.missionDetails: Through chair reservations, real-time updates, and exclusive member perks, we make it easier for you to enjoy your favorite barraca spots while helping barracas build stronger customer loyalty.
about.valuesDescription: The values that drive our loyalty platform and community

passion.title: Passion for Rio
passion.description: We love Rio de Janeiro and want to connect barraca lovers with their favorite spots.

community.title: Community First
community.description: Building loyalty between customers and barracas through better communication and service.

convenience.title: Convenience
convenience.description: Reserve chairs, get updates, and enjoy exclusive perks at participating barracas.

benefits.title: Member Benefits
benefits.description: Exclusive offers, priority service, and special events for loyal customers.

about.teamDescription: Barraca enthusiasts and tech experts working to strengthen Rio's barraca community

vincent.bio: Born and raised in the United States, Vincent brings over 5 years of experience in international business development and relationship building across diverse markets.

jordi.bio: Dedicated professional with expertise in business process optimization and customer relationship management.

ricardo.name: Ricardo Del Razo
ricardo.bio: Strategic partnership expert with experience in developing and maintaining key business relationships.

janeese.name: Janeesa Hollingshead

leticia.name: Leticia Castilhos
leticia.bio: Digital marketing specialist focused on building engaging online communities and driving brand awareness through social media.

seo.title: Jobs | KRL Closet Club
seo.description: Open opportunities at KRL Closet Club in Rio de Janeiro for university students and early-career talent.

hero.title: Join CC club
hero.description: We are hiring motivated young people in Rio. Every role on this page is entry-level, with practical responsibilities, mentorship, and flexible schedules designed for student life.
hero.highlight: We especially want to hear from candidates who live in Rio. Being Brazilian and currently in university is a strong plus for these openings.

whatsapp.intro: Hi KRL Closet Club, I want to apply for the {{jobTitle}} role.
whatsapp.name: Name

executiveAssistant.title: Executive Assistant to the CEO
executiveAssistant.summary: Work directly with the founder to keep operations moving fast: scheduling, follow-ups, and execution support.
responsibilities: Manage calendar, messages, and daily priority tracking
Create weekly action summaries and keep tasks organized
Support outreach and coordination with partners
idealFor: Rio-based candidates; Brazilian background and university enrollment are strong advantages
Strong written communication in Portuguese; English is a plus
Comfortable working in a startup-style environment

socialMediaAssistant.title: Social Media (Instagram) Marketing Assistant
socialMediaAssistant.pay: Base stipend + growth bonus based on performance
socialMediaAssistant.summary: Help us grow awareness and engagement on Instagram with consistent content and local storytelling.
responsibilities: Capture and edit short-form content at beach locations
Plan weekly posting calendar and caption drafts
Track follower growth, saves, shares, and campaign outcomes
idealFor: Rio-based candidates; Brazilian background and university enrollment are strong advantages
Students who already create content for Instagram or Reels
Strong visual taste and reliable posting habits
Comfortable talking to people and filming in public

customerRelationships.title: Customer Relationships Representative
customerRelationships.summary: Meet barraca teams directly, explain KRL Closet Club offerings, and help onboard new partners.
responsibilities: Visit barracas, build trust, and introduce partnership benefits
Support registration conversations and onboarding follow-through
Collect feedback from operators to improve our service
idealFor: Rio-based candidates; Brazilian background and university enrollment are strong advantages
Students who enjoy in-person communication and sales-style outreach
Confident, friendly, and resilient with follow-ups
Portuguese fluency required; English helpful for mixed audiences

streetActivation.title: Street Activation & QR Outreach Ambassador
streetActivation.summary: Engage people in high-traffic beach areas, invite them to scan the QR code, and represent the KRL Closet Club mission with confidence and energy.
responsibilities: Approach beachgoers and explain the value of scanning the KRL Closet Club QR code
Share the brand mission clearly and answer common questions
Track daily scan activity and feedback from conversations
idealFor: Rio-based candidates; Brazilian background and university enrollment are strong advantages
Comfortable speaking with new people and maintaining positive energy
Reliable, coachable, and motivated by measurable outreach results

engineeringIntern.title: Software Engineering Intern (Mission AI)
engineeringIntern.summary: Support Mission AI and product development through coding tasks, small feature builds, bug fixes, and implementation support across the platform.
responsibilities: Work on practical coding tasks with clear guidance from the team
Help ship small features and fixes in the web product
Document progress and communicate blockers early
idealFor: General interest in software engineering and willingness to learn fast
Must have access to your own computer and be a trustworthy, reliable person

hostingGuidelines.seoDescription: Guidelines for CC Club hosts — punctuality, payments, facilitation, and barraca partnerships.

hero.title: Carioca Coastal Club Hosting Guidelines
hero.subtitle: Your job is simple: create a reliable, welcoming experience.

g1.title: Be On Time (Non-Negotiable)
g1.intro: If you say you'll be there at a certain time, be there.
g1.rule: Once you set a time, you are responsible for showing up.

g2.title: Go "Online" — Signal You're Live
g2.takePhoto: Take a photo of the setup
g2.sendToMe: Send it to me → I'll post it

g3.title: Communication Rules — Keep It Tight
g3.rule1: You are not there to text.

g4.title: No RSVP Culture
g4.doNot: Do NOT ask people to RSVP, react, or confirm attendance.
g4.reason1: People don't engage unless others already have
g4.reason2: It creates the appearance that nothing is happening
g4.reason3: It adds unnecessary noise to the group
g4.ifComing: If someone is coming, they will message you directly.
g4.job1: Your job is not to chase attendance.
g4.job2: Your job is to be there reliably.

g5.title: Host Energy — Facilitation
g5.pull: Pull in anyone who looks lost
g5.phrase: "Hey, this is Carioca Coastal Club — come join us."

g6.title: Chairs & Setup
g6.notResponsible: You are not responsible for pricing
g6.ifOff: If anything is off → message me

g7.title: Payments
g7.order: Tell people: Order → wait → pay → return
g7.warning: If you don't enforce this → you will be stuck with the bill

g9.title: Hosting Structure
g9.mustBePhysical: At least one host must be physically there

g10.title: Keep the Group Clean
g10.assigning: I'm assigning Barraca Partnership Managers for each location.
g10.ideally: Ideally pick a barraca near where you live — you'll personally benefit from the partnership too.
g10.commission: Any partnership or deal you broker = 100% commission to you. I won't take a dime.
g10.bigGoal: The bigger goal: expand CC Club across all key beach areas — Copa, Leblon, multiple in Ipanema, Arpoador, and other high-traffic zones. This is how we build real presence and consistency.
g10.onePerBarraca: One person per barraca for now. If you have a friend who'd be a great fit, add them to the group and we'll sort it out together.
